ddls:
CREATE TABLE "mirna_profiles" (
  "mirna_index" INTEGER /* Index of the miRNA profile */,
  "U" INTEGER /* Number of U base pairs */,
  "A" INTEGER /* Number of A base pairs */,
  "C" INTEGER /* Number of C base pairs */,
  "G" INTEGER /* Number of G base pairs */,
  "G_adar" INTEGER /* Count of G-adenosine adducts */,
  "U_snp" INTEGER /* Count of U SNPs */,
  "A_snp" INTEGER /* Count of A SNPs */,
  "C_snp" INTEGER /* Count of C SNPs */,
  "G_snp" INTEGER /* Count of G SNPs */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample this miRNA profile is from */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment this miRNA profile is part of */,
  "profile_date" TEXT /* Date when the miRNA profile was generated */,
  "profile_quality" REAL /* Quality score of the miRNA profile */,
  "profile_comment" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the miRNA profile */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mirna_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirna_profiles_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mirna_profiles_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or label for the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of biological sample (e.g., tissue, blood) */,
  "donor_info" TEXT /* Information about the donor of the sample */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species from which the sample was collected */,
  "tissue_type" TEXT /* Type of tissue (e.g., liver, brain) */,
  "disease_state" TEXT /* Disease state of the sample (e.g., healthy, cancer) */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect the sample */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample was stored */,
  "collection_site" TEXT /* Geographic location where the sample was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Institution or lab the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher (e.g., principal investigator, analyst) */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the researcher */,
  "research_interests" TEXT /* Research interests or specializations of the researcher */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample used in the experiment */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was performed */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Description of the protocol used in the experiment */,
  "experiment_type" TEXT /* Type of experiment (e.g., miRNA sequencing, SNP analysis) */,
  "experiment_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the experiment in hours */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_cost" REAL /* Cost associated with the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., completed, in progress) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related experiment */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the dataset was uploaded */,
  "data_file_path" TEXT /* File path where the dataset is stored */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, FASTQ) */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License or terms of use for the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality control entry */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being assessed */,
  "qc_score" REAL /* Quality control score for the dataset */,
  "qc_comment" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality control assessment */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the quality control was performed */,
  "qc_method" TEXT /* Method used for quality control */,
  "qc_tool" TEXT /* Tool or software used for quality control */,
  "qc_threshold" REAL /* Threshold for passing quality control */,
  "qc_remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the quality control process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snp_variants" (
  "snp_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SNP variant */,
  "mirna_index" INTEGER /* Reference to the miRNA profile it is associated with */,
  "snp_type" TEXT /* Type of SNP (e.g., substitution, insertion) */,
  "snp_location" TEXT /* Location of the SNP in the sequence */,
  "snp_effect" TEXT /* Effect of the SNP on gene expression or function */,
  "snp_frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the SNP in the population */,
  "snp_reference" TEXT /* Reference allele for the SNP */,
  "snp_alternate" TEXT /* Alternate allele for the SNP */,
  "snp_impact" TEXT /* Impact of the SNP (e.g., high, moderate, low) */,
  "snp_db_id" TEXT /* Database identifier for the SNP (e.g., dbSNP ID) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snp_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snp_variants_mirna_index FOREIGN KEY ("mirna_index") REFERENCES mirna_profiles ("mirna_index")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "meta_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for metadata entries */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset this metadata refers to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset or experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the metadata was created */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "data_version" TEXT /* Version of the data */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License or terms of use for the data */,
  "data_reference" TEXT /* Reference or citation for the data */,
  "data_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords or tags for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meta_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_metadata_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access (e.g., read, write, admin) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in minutes */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
